welcomeHint: Use the panel on the right to work with AI on security review and code questions. Open a local folder to get started.

onboarding.title: AI Code Audit Guide
onboarding.subtitle: Pick a directory and an audit style, then start the audit.
onboarding.selectDirectoryFirst: Please select a directory to audit first
onboarding.selectStyleFirst: Please select an audit style first
onboarding.styleCodeDesc: For complex business logic, cross-file correlation, and natural-language risk explanation.
onboarding.styleSkillDesc: Specialized analysis for Skill and rule-based audit scenarios.
onboarding.messageRequired: Please enter a message to send
onboarding.startHint: Edit the preset message if needed. Start sends it and locks the style. Open Only opens the directory and fills the input without running AI.
